title: lyonia villosa var. villosa
intro: Lyonia villosa var. villosa, also known as Rough-leaved Lyonia, is a shrub native to eastern North America, characterized by its oval-shaped leaves and clusters of small, white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lyonia villosa var. villosa are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Lyonia villosa var. villosa can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
